title: We should have the opportunity to hire different numbers of seats per Monday product
excerpt: We have today 10 seats of Monday Work Management and we would like to have 3 seats on Monday CRM and the upgrade option doesn’t allow this.  Is it possible or not?  If not will be easier to buy Pipedrive as we can have o…

posts.author: MarcusTavares_TheEnd (Marcus Tavares)
posts.cookedHtml: We have today 10 seats of Monday Work Management and we would like to have 3 seats on Monday CRM and the upgrade option doesn’t allow this. Is it possible or not? If not will be easier to buy Pipedrive as we can have only 3 seats for CRM. TKS
